name: followrabbit
description: Cloud cost optimization for GCP infrastructure. Review changes for cost impact and auto-apply savings recommendations using the followrabbit CLI.

interface.shortDescription: AI-powered GCP cost review for Terraform and SQL
interface.longDescription: FollowRabbit scans your local Terraform and SQL files, runs AI-powered cost analysis against the FollowRabbit API, and returns actionable optimization instructions. Codex can then apply the suggested changes directly to your code. Covers compute sizing, storage classes, BigQuery partitioning/clustering, labels, lifecycle rules, autoscaling, HA over-provisioning, network tier, and committed use discounts.
defaultPrompt: Run a FollowRabbit cost review on this repository and summarize the optimization opportunities.
Check these Terraform changes for cost impact before I commit.
List the open FollowRabbit recommendations for this repo and help me apply the top ones.
